    Loading…
    Tasty Bistro in Crystal Lake, IL, has closed its physical location and merged with its sister restaurant, Tasty Sushi in Cary, due to rising costs, with all staff and the menu moving to the Cary location. While the Crystal Lake restaurant is no longer operating, customers can still find the same food and staff at the Cary location, which is located at 630 Northwest Highway. The business is also considering public feedback on how to potentially reopen the Crystal Lake location in the future. 
    Links
      +2
      Tasty Bistro in Crystal Lake, IL, has closed its physical location and merged with its sister restaurant, Tasty Sushi in Cary, due to rising costs, with all staff and the menu moving to the Cary location. While the Crystal Lake restaurant is no longer operating, customers can still find the same food and staff at the Cary location, which is located at 630 Northwest Highway. The business is also considering public feedback on how to potentially reopen the Crystal Lake location in the future. 
      • Closure: The Crystal Lake location at 394 W. Virginia St. closed in early 2026. 
      • Consolidation: Operations have moved to Tasty Sushi in Cary. 
      • Menu: The full menu, including sushi, Chinese, Thai, and all-you-can-eat options, is available at the Cary location. 
      • Future: The owners are seeking customer input on reopening the Crystal Lake location.

        ⁦Google review summary⁩
        4.4(331)

        Reviews are automatically processed to detect inappropriate content like fake reviews and spam. We may take down reviews that are flagged in order to comply with Google policies or legal obligations.

        Diners say this restaurant offers delicious and fresh sushi, with many highlighting the "all you can eat" option as a great deal. They also mention the beautiful, palace-like decor and the friendly, attentive staff.
        Some reviews mention the Thai food can be bland.
